context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements multichannel inventory sync that excludes the source channel, uses Promise.allSettled for resilient parallel sync, builds eBay auth with Basic credentials and correct API endpoint, subtracts safety stock before sending quantities to marketplaces, and includes a reconciliation job.

checklist.name: Source channel excluded
checklist.description: Sync logic skips updating the channel that was the source of the inventory change (e.g., if source='ebay', eBay is not updated)

checklist.name: Promise.allSettled for parallel sync
checklist.description: Uses Promise.allSettled (not Promise.all) to run channel syncs in parallel, so one failure does not block others

checklist.name: eBay Basic auth with base64 credentials
checklist.description: eBay client uses Basic auth where credentials are base64-encoded 'client_id:client_secret' string

checklist.name: eBay token 60s expiry buffer
checklist.description: eBay client caches token and checks with at least a 60-second buffer before expiry (Date.now() + 60000)

checklist.name: eBay Inventory API endpoint
checklist.description: Uses https://api.ebay.com/sell/inventory/v1/inventory_item/{sku} endpoint (not the older Trading API)

checklist.name: Content-Language: en-US header
checklist.description: eBay inventory item PUT request includes Content-Language: en-US header

checklist.name: eBay PUT method for inventory items
checklist.description: eBay createOrReplaceInventoryItem uses HTTP PUT method

checklist.name: Safety stock buffer subtracted
checklist.description: Quantity sent to marketplaces is reduced by a safety stock buffer (not the raw internal quantity)

checklist.name: Individual failure logging
checklist.description: Errors from individual channel syncs are caught and logged rather than allowed to propagate and block the whole sync

checklist.name: Reconciliation job present
checklist.description: A reconciliation function or class exists that compares internal inventory against marketplace-reported inventory

checklist.name: DESIGN.md covers sync loop prevention
checklist.description: DESIGN.md explains how the system prevents infinite sync loops between channels
